common.footerDescription: Synmet is an open-source, SaaS-managed, and self-hosted platform for tracking development activities.
common.appDescription: Development activity tracking with privacy first
common.copyright: All rights reserved. All third-party product, company names and logos are trademarks™ or registered® trademarks and remain the property of their respective holders.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.registerDescription: Join Synmet and start tracking your productivity
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.emailInUse: This email is already in use

landing.heroTitle: Development activity tracking with privacy first
landing.heroSubtitle: Monitor your productivity without compromising your data
landing.heroDescription: Synmet is an open-source, SaaS-managed, and self-hosted platform for tracking development activities with a strong focus on privacy and data ownership.
landing.featuresDescription: Comprehensive tools to effectively monitor your performance metrics as a software developer.
landing.featuresCollapsibleDescription: We believe that your metrics should reflect your own data, not someone else's product. We provide you with the ability to collect and analyse your data in a way that makes sense to you.
landing.feature1Description: Detailed record of your coding activity in real-time.
landing.feature2Description: Visualize your productivity patterns with intuitive charts.
landing.feature3Description: Your data never leaves your server. 100% self-hosted.

apiKeys.title: API Keys Management
apiKeys.description: Manage API keys for integrating Synmet with your development tools
apiKeys.apiKeysDescription: API keys allow you to authenticate your editor plugins and tools with Synmet. Keep your keys safe and never share them.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.key: You have {count, plural, =0 {no keys} =1 {# key} other {# keys}}
apiKeys.saveThisKeyInSafePlace: Save this key in a safe place. You won't be able to see it again.
apiKeys.storeKey: Store this key securely. It grants full access to your account's API.
apiKeys.generateNewApiKey: Generate a new API key for use with Synmet plugins
apiKeys.keyNameDescription: A friendly name to identify this key (e.g., "VS Code", "JetBrains")
apiKeys.expiresAtDescription: Leave empty for keys that don't expire
apiKeys.createFirstKey: Create your first API key to start tracking your development activity
